summary: P0 and P1 Football Features Testing Complete. All features verified working: Backend game creation fixed, Simple/Advanced mode navigation working, Simple Football UI with all P0 features (dark grey scoring buttons, color-coded stat buttons, ±1sec/min clock controls, quarter transitions, turnover workflows, keyboard shortcuts).
critical_code_review_comments: Backend fix applied correctly - baseball fields now have proper defaults (lines 2371-2378 in server.py)
NewGame.jsx navigation logic correctly routes to /football/{id}/simple for simple mode and /football/{id} for advanced mode
SimpleFootballLiveGame.jsx has all P0 features implemented with correct data-testid attributes
Keyboard shortcuts (spacebar, backslash) working for clock control
seed_data_creation: Created 2 test football games during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0 and P1 football features are working. Backend game creation is fixed. Simple mode navigates to /football/{id}/simple, Advanced mode navigates to /football/{id}.

backend_game_creation.notes: POST /api/games now works for football games - baseball fields have proper defaults

simple_mode_navigation.notes: Game creation with simple_mode=true navigates to /football/{id}/simple

advanced_mode_navigation.notes: Game creation with advanced_mode=true navigates to /football/{id} (not /simple)

stat_mode_selector_ui.notes: Football stat mode selector visible with Simple (orange) and Advanced (green) options

advanced_mode_default.notes: Advanced mode is pre-selected by default (border-green-500 class)

back_button_navigation.notes: Back button on NewGame page navigates to /dashboard

scoring_buttons_ui.notes: Dark grey scoring buttons with white outline (+6 TD, +1 XP, +2 2PT, FG, +2 Safety)

stat_buttons_color_coded.notes: Color-coded stat buttons: green Rush, blue Pass, amber 1st Down, red Turnover, orange Penalty

clock_controls.notes: Clock toggle button and ±1sec, ±1min adjustment buttons present and functional

quarter_controls.notes: Quarter up/down buttons present for quarter transitions

keyboard_shortcuts_spacebar.notes: Spacebar toggles clock (verified clock changed from 15:00 to 14:59)

turnover_workflow.notes: Turnover dialog shows all options: Interception, Fumble, Turnover on Downs

advanced_football_page_loads.notes: FootballLiveGame (Advanced) page loads with kickoff dialog
